evidence_pattern: Single strong diagonal between query and reference
likely_interpretation: Assembly agrees with reference at chromosome scale
reviewer_note: Do not overinterpret tiny local breaks in repeat-rich regions.

evidence_pattern: Diagonal changes orientation near a chromosome end
likely_interpretation: True inversion, orientation error, or reference difference
reviewer_note: Do not flip sequence only because one reference disagrees.

evidence_pattern: One contig segment aligns to a different chromosome
recommended_action: Inspect HiFi read depth, Hi-C map, k-mer support, and alternate references
reviewer_note: Break only when independent evidence supports misassembly.

evidence_pattern: Repeated diagonal block with elevated self-alignment
likely_interpretation: Duplicated haplotig, segmental duplication, or collapsed/expanded repeat
reviewer_note: Real crop duplications are common; avoid automatic deletion.

evidence_pattern: Assembly spans a region missing in reference
recommended_action: Check read support, taxonomy, and related assemblies
reviewer_note: Retain if supported and biologically plausible.
